etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "loathe" + "-ing" from Old English "lāþian" (to hate, feel disgust)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Hate disgust; experiencing intense hatred and loathing intense supported by healing awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Hate disgust → intense hatred → contemporary loathing intense and loathing hatred that benefits from compassion growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Hate disgust → intense hatred → loathing intense → compassion understanding
